summary: ANDROID | Language change - After succesful Lang change previous one is selected in settings, after second change unavailable dialog appears
scenario: Language selection in settings still shows previous language after firmware update, and changing language again shows 'Update currently not available' dialog until app restart
description_clean: After a successful language change via firmware update, the previous language selection is still displayed in settings. When attempting to change the language again, a dialog saying 'Update currently not available' appears. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version (with the new language) is displayed.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Perform a firmware update that includes a new language pack.
5. After the update completes successfully, go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Language.
6. Observe the language selection displayed in settings.
7. Attempt to change the language to a different option.
9. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
10. Navigate back to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Language and observe the displayed firmware version and language.
expected: After a successful firmware update with a new language, the Language settings should immediately reflect the new language. Changing the language should work without errors. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version with the new language should be displayed.
actual: After the firmware update, the previous language selection is still displayed in settings. When attempting to change the language, a dialog appears saying 'Update currently not available'. After restarting the app, the correct firmware version (with the new language) is displayed.
